descFull: High-performance AI pipeline engine with a C++ core and 50+ Python-extensible nodes. Build, debug, and scale LLM workflows with 13+ model providers, 8+ vector databases, and agent orchestration, all from your IDE. Includes VS Code extension, TypeScript/Python SDKs, and Docker deployment.
